opportunities.transformation_hook: $30 backsplash swap, zero contractor, done in an afternoon
opportunities.before_state: Dated, plain builder-grade tile or bare painted wall behind the stove/sink
opportunities.after_state: Crisp white subway-tile look installed edge-to-edge in under 2 hours
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple's backsplash/countertop pairing pins and HGTV's renter-friendly kitchen-upgrade trend are both surfacing this exact swap right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa slipcover

opportunities.after_state: Smooth, tailored neutral slipcover that reads as a new couch
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's high-impact-for-low-budget and renter-friendly decorating pins line up with this exact category, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes it the highest-margin easy transformation available.
